examples: The epinephrine injection may be applied through clothing.
Epinephrine is one of the most potent vasopressor drugs known.
Lymphocytosis occurs in some species, especially the cat, as a response to epinephrine secretion.
Both over-the-counter antihistamines and prescribed epinephrine auto-injectors have an expiration date, after which their effectiveness diminishes.
An antihistamine such as Benadryl will be given and, in severe cases, a shot of epinephrine.
